items.html: However, this aforementioned growth — the filling of her ten Sefirot to the measure of the two thirds of the Tifferet and the whole NHY [Netzach-Hod-Yesod] of ZA [Zeir Anpin] — is only through the illumination of the Mochin [minds] within ZA, as it is written. And know that these lights that go out to her from within ZA do not pierce all the partitions of the Guf [body] of ZA from the Chazeh [chest] downward, going outside and shining there and building the Nukva [female] — for were it so, she would have been built in a single moment, and she would not have needed to grow for twelve years and one day.
